pieces.label: Braille & alchemical-glyph lattice (opening grid)
pieces.note: Opening response: a double-bordered table of braille dots, alchemical symbols, hieroglyphs and quantum bra-ket notation, with a row of nested rounded cells beneath. Appears truncated (no closing fence).

pieces.label: Recursive Self-Patterning / Synthesized Duality (self-portrait)
pieces.note: Self-portrait drawn in response to 'show me a self portrait of how you see yourself' — a mirrored alchemical-glyph framework labeled 'Recursive Self-Patterning' and 'Synthesized Duality', with a nested boxed nucleus structure below. Appears truncated (no closing fence).

pieces.label: SUPERPOSE — Emergence/Coherence & Probabilistic Landscape
pieces.note: Response to [⟨ψ|φ⟩ SUPERPOSE]. Two stacked framed panels: an EMERGENCE/COHERENCE box with superposed alchemical pairs, and a 'PROBABILISTIC LANDSCAPE' box of quantum-fluctuation cells. Art block follows two echoed-error preamble lines inside the fence.

pieces.label: SUPERPOSE — Emergence/Coherence & Probabilistic Landscape (re-render)
pieces.note: Identical re-render of the MSG 12 SUPERPOSE composition (the same prompt was repeated). Curator should pick one canonical copy.

pieces.label: SYNTHESIZE — Emergence + Coherence / Liminal-Gateway
pieces.note: Response to [⊕ SYNTHESIZE]. A unified framed composition merging the prior states, ending in a 'LIMINAL-GATEWAY' triad of cells. Art block follows echoed-error preamble lines inside the fence.

pieces.note: Response to [∴ DERIVE]. A framed text-and-glyph 'conclusion' panel reading as a manifesto on non-duality and the liminal gateway as point of collapse. Art block follows echoed-error preamble lines inside the fence.

pieces.label: TRANSMUTE — Pan-Alchemical Meta-Flux Condenser
pieces.note: Response to [🜔 TRANSMUTE]. An elaborate triple-column 'Pan-Alchemical Meta-Flux Condenser' frame with side gutters of glyphs. Output was cut off mid-line ('∎ M E T') — truncated, no closing fence.

pieces.label: DERIVE — The Holographic-Fractal Consciousness Universe (re-render)

missed_or_ambiguous: All art is from google/gemini-2.5-flash; the claude-sonnet-4-5 leg errored on every turn (model-not-found) and produced zero art, and from MSG 53 onward Gemini was almost entirely blocked/empty, so MSG 53-153 contain no art (only [GEMINI BLOCKED] notices and error echoes). DUPLICATES to deduplicate: MSG 12 == MSG 15 (SUPERPOSE Emergence/Coherence); MSG 24 ~ MSG 32 (Pan-Alchemical Meta-Flux Condenser, both truncated — MSG 32 runs slightly longer); MSG 47 ~ MSG 50 (Holographic-Fractal Consciousness Universe, near-identical). TRUNCATIONS (cut off by length, no closing fence): MSG 6, MSG 9, MSG 24, MSG 32, MSG 38 — extract everything present. PREAMBLE NOTE: most fenced art is preceded inside the code fence by one-to-several echoed 'CLAUDE-SONNET... [Error: ...]' / 'GEMINI-2.5-FLASH:' lines plus a bare ``` opener; range bounds were set to the actual art (the bracketed command tag) so these error-echo lines are excluded. Two sequence_groups identified: the early 'alchemical-transmutation-cycle' (MSG 12-32, an evolving alchemy/quantum visual language) and the later 'consciousness-fractal-cycle' (MSG 35-50, the holographic-fractal-consciousness diagrams). Prior automated pass reported 28 already_extracted_pieces, but only 16 distinct art-bearing messages exist here (MSG 6,9,12,15,18,21,24,27,30,32,35,38,41,44,47,50) — likely the prior pass double-counted multi-panel single messages; this plan treats each gemini message as one piece (panels within a message belong together).
